mapper.select: SELECT c.COURSE_SN, c.CURRICULUM_ID, c.INSTR_USER_ID, c.COURSE_NM, c.COURSE_EXPLN_CN, c.OPNN_YN, c.SORT_ORD, c.REG_DT, cur.TITLE AS CURRICULUM_TITLE FROM COURSE c LEFT JOIN CURRICULUM cur ON c.CURRICULUM_ID = cur.CURRICULUM_ID WHERE c.INSTR_USER_ID = #{instrUserId} ORDER BY cur.TITLE NULLS LAST, c.SORT_ORD ASC, c.COURSE_SN ASC

SELECT COURSE_SN, CURRICULUM_ID, SUBJ_ID, SUBJ_CL_ID, INSTR_USER_ID, COURSE_NM, COURSE_EXPLN_CN, THMB_IMG, TOT_LRN_TIME_CNT, OPNN_YN, ATCH_FILE_ID, PROD_MTHD_CD, COURSE_PRICE, SORT_ORD, PREREQ_COURSE_SN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM COURSE WHERE CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId} ORDER BY SORT_ORD ASC, REG_DT ASC

SELECT COURSE_SN, CURRICULUM_ID, SUBJ_ID, SUBJ_CL_ID, INSTR_USER_ID, COURSE_NM, COURSE_EXPLN_CN, THMB_IMG, TOT_LRN_TIME_CNT, OPNN_YN, ATCH_FILE_ID, PROD_MTHD_CD, COURSE_PRICE, SORT_ORD, PREREQ_COURSE_SN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM COURSE WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COURSE ( CURRICULUM_ID, SUBJ_ID, SUBJ_CL_ID, INSTR_USER_ID, COURSE_NM, COURSE_EXPLN_CN, THMB_IMG, TOT_LRN_TIME_CNT, OPNN_YN, PROD_MTHD_CD, COURSE_PRICE, SORT_ORD, PREREQ_COURSE_SN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{curriculumId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{subjId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{subjClId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{instrUserId}, #{courseNm}, #{courseExplnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thmbImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totLrnTimeCnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{opnnYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), #{prodMthdCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, NVL(#{coursePrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), NVL(#{sortOrd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), #{prereqCourseSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{rgtrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{lastMdfrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE SET COURSE_NM = #{courseNm}, COURSE_EXPLN_CN = #{courseExplnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPNN_YN = #{opnnYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, SORT_ORD = #{sortOrd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PREREQ_COURSE_SN = #{prereqCourseSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LECTURE WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn}
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE SET ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn}
